title: Arth Machines
description: Adds unique electrical devices such as the Time Accelerator or Random Item Generator.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9deabc254adc7f3b7ddf464f376212b2ecbfdf72.png)

# 📥 Installation
### ⚠️ Important: **[MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/project/G1ckZuWK)** is required for this mod to work.
 * Download **Arth Machines**.
 * Download **[MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/project/G1ckZuWK)**.
 * Place both files in your mods folder.
 * **Note: Ensure the MixinBooter filename starts with a special character (like !mixinbooter.jar) to load correctly.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_ap5xCW2kvU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 

**Craft unique devices you won't find in ordinary mods!**
Currently, the mod implements the following mechanisms:
 * **Temporal Accelerator**: A multiblock structure that allows you to accelerate time. This works globally across the entire server and affects all mechanics.
 * **Unstable Materializer**: This device accepts absolutely any item and, in exchange for a certain quantity, generates a random in-game item. It can produce anything, in any quantity, with any enchantments or durability.
* **Laser Turret**: A smart block that attacks targeted units. You can set whitelists and blacklists for players. The turret can be upgraded, including the ability to break blocks. This makes it a very powerful defense for your base.
* **Gravity Manipulator**: A block that attracts or repel mobs, items, and anything else that can move. You can combine multiple of these to combine their power. Use Shift+RMB to toggle between modes.

![laser turret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49dd40d7159655a38486394764e7c17601f55350.png)

**This is a technical mod, so the machines accept standard RF energy**.

**Warning**: Be careful with the Temporal Accelerator. The maximum acceleration is 5x; please ensure your computer or server can handle this load. A configuration file to adjust the maximum and minimum TPS limits will be added in the future.
If you are only interested in full control over game time, you can check out my other mod - [TickRate](https://modrinth.com/mod/tickrate).
